name: Cognitive Condensation Theory
core_claim: Cooper pair formation is a phase transition analogous to flow state entry: scattered electrons condense into coherent paired states exhibiting zero-resistance transport when challenge-skill balance (phonon coupling at critical temperature) is reached.

name: Allostatic Load Theory of Software Degradation
core_claim: Software systems accumulate 'allostatic load' through repeated adaptive responses to stressors (deadline patches, scope changes, dependency churn). When cumulative wear exceeds repair capacity, the system enters allostatic overload — a phase transition where failures cascade and incremental fixes accelerate degradation.

mapped_components.unit: Software system (codebase + infra + team knowledge) maintaining operational homeostasis
mapped_components.variation: Hotfixes, workarounds, expedient coupling, deferred migrations — individually rational, cumulatively corrosive
mapped_components.selection: Overload threshold where architectural distortion exceeds team's comprehension/repair capacity
mapped_components.fitness: Ratio of intended-change effort to total-change effort (including regression hunting, side effects)
mapped_components.boundary: Team resilience (institutional knowledge, test coverage, refactoring culture) and recovery opportunity

falsifiable_predictions: Systems without maintenance cycles show superlinear (not linear) defect density growth — matching biological allostatic overload.
Stressor-to-recovery ratio predicts degradation better than absolute stressor volume.
Stress inoculation (controlled chaos engineering during calm) builds measurably higher crisis resilience.
Post-overload subsystems accumulate new load faster than never-overloaded equivalents (scarring effect).

name: Cognitive Compilation Theory
core_claim: Compiler optimization restructured as iterative distortion-detection — each IR statement is an 'automatic thought' with possible cognitive distortions (catastrophizing = excessive error paths, overgeneralization = missed specialization), and optimization passes are Socratic questioning testing statements against evidence.

mapped_components.unit: IR statement as automatic thought — may or may not be well-adapted to context
mapped_components.variation: Code distortions: catastrophizing (excessive checks), black-and-white (no partial eval), overgeneralization (unnecessary polymorphism)
mapped_components.selection: Multi-pass analysis as Socratic questioning — liveness, constant propagation, PGO each test against evidence
mapped_components.fitness: Reduction in computational maladaptation: fewer instructions, lower latency, eliminated dead code
mapped_components.boundary: Requires metacognitive capacity (static analysis infra); dynamic languages need runtime 'therapy' (JIT)

falsifiable_predictions: Distortion-taxonomy pass ordering achieves equivalent optimization with fewer total passes.
CBT-inspired hierarchical ordering outperforms random pass scheduling for multi-distortion code regions.
PGO disproportionately benefits code with high 'overgeneralization' distortion scores.

name: Regulatory Contact Trace Theory
core_claim: Every regulatory interaction between a transcription factor and target gene leaves a detectable molecular trace (epigenetic marks, chromatin remodeling), and the evidentiary value for reconstructing network topology is proportional to trace rarity × persistence — mirroring forensic contact traces.

mapped_components.unit: Regulatory contact event: TF engaging a cis-regulatory element
mapped_components.variation: Trace types: histone marks, methylation, pioneer footprints, cofactor residues
mapped_components.selection: Every contact leaves a trace; detection depends on assay sensitivity
mapped_components.fitness: Evidentiary value = trace rarity × persistence for network reconstruction
mapped_components.boundary: Detection sensitivity floor; highly connected hubs create 'contaminated scenes'

falsifiable_predictions: Rare-TF-regulated genes retain more distinct epigenetic signatures than hub-gene targets.
Transient TF binding leaves decaying chromatin traces with quantifiable half-lives.
Trace-rarity-weighted GRN inference outperforms unweighted approaches against gold standards.

name: Relational Tension Theory of Network Stability
core_claim: Actor-networks stabilize or fracture based on relational tension distribution — overtightened connections (coercion) snap, undertightened ones (disengagement) slip, and only balanced tension produces durable assemblages, mirroring how fabric integrity depends on even thread tension.

mapped_components.unit: Actor as thread; warp = incumbent structural actors, weft = newly enrolled cross-cutting actors
mapped_components.variation: Tension = asymmetric demands during translation; varies by power differentials and enrollment cost
mapped_components.selection: Balanced tension → stable flexible assemblage; imbalanced → overtightened snap or undertightened slip
mapped_components.fitness: Network durability — capacity to maintain coherent action across heterogeneous actors over time
mapped_components.boundary: Actor material/semiotic properties limit tension tolerance; institutional scaffolding constrains configurations

falsifiable_predictions: Networks with concentrated obligatory passage points are more brittle upon that actor's defection.
Coercive enrollment produces 'puckering' — tight core clustering with peripheral detachment.
Tension-balancing interventions increase network longevity vs unbalanced growth.

name: Two-Process Model of Economic Cycle Regulation
core_claim: GDP is governed by two independent processes: homeostatic spending pressure (Process E, accumulates during contraction) and a structural oscillator (Process K, ~7-10yr credit/policy cycle). Recessions trigger when E falls below K's threshold; performance peaks when E and K are in phase.

mapped_components.unit: Aggregate output as 'arousal state' — high GDP = economic wakefulness, recession = sleep
mapped_components.variation: Process E (pent-up demand/savings accumulating) + Process K (credit cycle oscillator, ~7-10yr)
mapped_components.selection: Recession when E falls below K threshold; recovery when E rebuilds above it
mapped_components.fitness: GDP maximized when E and K are in phase; misalignment → stagflation or jobless recovery
mapped_components.boundary: MPC determines E accumulation rate; central bank policy acts as 'light exposure' phase-shifting K

falsifiable_predictions: Prolonged expansions without savings buildup produce deeper recessions when K contracts.
Counter-cyclical stimulus is most effective early in K's contractionary phase.
Higher-MPC nations exhibit shorter, more frequent cycles with smaller amplitude.

name: Inhibitory Field Settlement Theory
core_claim: New settlements nucleate at points of lowest cumulative inhibition from existing centers, producing golden-angle spiral patterns rather than hexagonal grids — yielding more efficient coverage than Christaller's static tiling when growth is sequential.

mapped_components.unit: Settlement as leaf primordium generating an inhibitory field suppressing nearby formation
mapped_components.variation: Inhibitory fields of different radii scaled by settlement order
mapped_components.selection: New settlements at lowest cumulative inhibition — where unmet demand is greatest
mapped_components.fitness: Minimized travel distance + maximized non-overlapping coverage
mapped_components.boundary: Requires sequential founding, continuous demand surface; linear infrastructure distorts fields

falsifiable_predictions: On uniform terrain, consecutive settlement angular separations cluster near 137.5° ± 15°.
Linear infrastructure collapses spiral patterns into bilateral symmetry.
Nearest-to-second-nearest neighbor distance ratio approximates golden ratio (1.618).

name: Effort-Qualified Turbulence (EQT)
core_claim: Turbulent flow structures classified by four Laban-like effort factors: Weight (momentum flux), Time (acceleration profile), Space (vorticity alignment), Flow (strain constraint). The combinatorial state determines each parcel's role in the turbulent cascade.

mapped_components.unit: Coherent fluid parcel (eddy/vortex tube) characterized by effort combination
mapped_components.variation: Four factors: Weight=momentum flux, Time=acceleration, Space=vorticity-strain alignment, Flow=constraint
mapped_components.selection: Reynolds number governs which combinations dominate; low Re = sustained-light-direct-bound (laminar)
mapped_components.fitness: Effort combination predicts contribution to dissipation and mixing efficiency
mapped_components.boundary: Viscosity/density set achievable range; boundary geometry constrains near-wall combinations

falsifiable_predictions: Sudden-strong-indirect-free parcels account for >60% of dissipation despite <25% of volume.
Sustained-light-direct-bound fraction crosses 50% near critical Re — new transition diagnostic.
Effort class distribution shows universal wall-normal stratification in wall units.

name: Inclusive Fitness Theory of Open Source
core_claim: Developers invest disproportionate effort in open source when 'relatedness' (shared dependency graph, employer, ecosystem) × benefit to recipients > cost — mirroring Hamilton's rB > C rule for eusocial altruism.

mapped_components.unit: Developer as organism with finite time contributing to projects
mapped_components.variation: Relatedness = shared org, dependency proximity, ecosystem overlap, personal use
mapped_components.selection: Contributions sustained when r × B > C; developers triage toward high-r projects
mapped_components.fitness: Inclusive fitness = direct career gains + Σ(r_i × B_i) across downstream beneficiaries
mapped_components.boundary: Requires kin recognition — visible dependency graphs, community channels, employer signals

falsifiable_predictions: Projects where contributors are direct users sustain higher per-capita contribution rates.
Contribution intensity correlates with dependency proximity (1-hop > 2-hop).
Loss of community infrastructure causes contribution collapse disproportionate to quality changes.
Corporate OSS programs show eusocial 'worker caste' patterns: high effort, low defection, fork suppression.

name: Stellar Prepotency Theory
core_claim: Stars follow a strict hierarchical fusion sequence mirroring Maslow's prepotency: each burning stage is a 'need level' that must be exhausted before the next activates, with stellar self-actualization defined as maximum nucleosynthetic complexity permitted by mass.

mapped_components.unit: Star as motivated system 'seeking' equilibrium through sequential fusion
mapped_components.variation: Five fusion levels: H-burning (physiological), He (safety), C/Ne (belonging), O/Si (esteem), supernova r-process (self-actualization)
mapped_components.selection: Prepotency: lighter fuel must be exhausted and core must contract to next Coulomb barrier threshold
mapped_components.fitness: Maximum nucleosynthetic complexity achieved — supernova = full self-actualization
mapped_components.boundary: Initial mass determines highest accessible level, like environmental constraints in Maslow

falsifiable_predictions: No star ignites heavier fusion while significant lighter fuel remains in core (strict prepotency).
Peak stellar 'flourishing' (longevity × element diversity) at intermediate mass ~8-25 solar masses.
Binary-stripped stars show truncated nucleosynthetic output vs isolated stars of same initial mass.

name: Entangled Intentionality Theory
core_claim: Entangled particles function as if each maintains a 'mental model' of its partner's measurement context — Bell violations correspond to second-order intentionality exceeding the first-order (local hidden variable) ceiling, bounded by a no-communication constraint analogous to cognitive load limits on recursive mentalizing.

mapped_components.variation: Measurement basis choice as perspective-taking frame
mapped_components.selection: Supraclassical correlations require at least second-order intentionality (modeling what the other models)
mapped_components.fitness: Bell violation degree as 'social competence'; Tsirelson bound = perfect mutual modeling
mapped_components.boundary: No-communication theorem as cognitive load ceiling — correlations can't become a channel

falsifiable_predictions: N-party entanglement decoherence scales like N-agent recursive belief difficulty.
Partial decoherence defaults to first-order correlations (Bell-satisfying), not uniform degradation.
Weak measurements show contextual updating consistent with Bayesian belief revision.

name: Staged Consensus Maturation
core_claim: Blockchain nodes undergo invariant developmental stages (reactive sync → symbolic validation → rule-based verification → formal reasoning) driven by disequilibrium, and no stage can be skipped without compromising fault tolerance — mirroring Piaget's cognitive development.

mapped_components.unit: Node's consensus schema — internal model of valid chain state
mapped_components.variation: Four stages: sensorimotor (sync-respond), preoperational (symbolic but no reversibility), concrete (rule-based verification), formal (hypothetical reasoning about partitions)
mapped_components.selection: Disequilibrium from forks/Byzantine messages forces schema accommodation or fork-off
mapped_components.fitness: Finality depth, reorg resilience, BFT threshold — increase with stage
mapped_components.boundary: Minimum observation history and computational capacity; stages build on prior structures

falsifiable_predictions: Nodes given full logic but denied raw block-processing experience show higher consensus failure rates.
Stage-2-only networks show characteristic 'egocentric forking' at predictable rates.
Time-to-finality improves in discrete jumps (stage transitions), not continuously.

name: Immune Reciprocity Theory
core_claim: Immune clonal selection operates as a gift economy: APCs 'gift' antigen to lymphocytes creating reciprocal obligation to mount effector response. Non-reciprocation = anergy (social death). System coherence requires continuous signal circulation — hoarding (sequestration) destroys integrity.

mapped_components.unit: Costimulatory exchange event between APC and lymphocyte
mapped_components.variation: Immediate reciprocity (innate), deferred (adaptive clonal expansion), generalized (bystander/trained immunity)
mapped_components.selection: Triple obligation: give (APCs present), receive (lymphocytes engage), reciprocate (effector differentiation)
mapped_components.fitness: Affinity maturation as status through generosity — highest reciprocators gain highest affinity
mapped_components.boundary: Self-tolerance as hoarding prohibition; autoimmunity = gift economy collapse

falsifiable_predictions: Restoring costimulation after prolonged blockade fails to reactivate same clones (irreversible social death).
B cell antigen-presentation capacity predicts GC selection beyond affinity alone.
Immune-privileged tissue transplants trigger disproportionately severe responses (hoarding taboo violation).
Trained immunity duration correlates with tissue cellularity and APC density.

name: SSLAM Theory of Psychotherapy
core_claim: Psychotherapy is dual-estimation: each intervention simultaneously updates the patient's map (beliefs, schemas) AND their pose (self-concept, felt position). Stagnation occurs when only one updates — insight without relocation, or behavioral change without map revision. Breakthroughs are loop-closure events.

mapped_components.unit: Patient's self-model decomposed into map (internalized schemas) and pose (felt identity/position)
mapped_components.variation: Therapeutic interventions as noisy sensor readings from heterogeneous modalities
mapped_components.selection: Bayesian update weighted by therapist calibration; insight = loop-closure globally correcting drift
mapped_components.fitness: Entropy reduction across both map and pose simultaneously; accurate real-world navigation
mapped_components.boundary: Therapeutic alliance as odometry baseline; patient readiness as initialization problem

falsifiable_predictions: Map-only or pose-only therapies show higher relapse than coupled-update approaches.
Breakthrough magnitude scales with temporal distance since original mapping (loop-closure size).
Successfully repaired alliance ruptures produce larger gains than unruptured alliances.
Most-impactful sessions are those where both self-concept clarity and belief coherence shift simultaneously.

name: Fixed-Point Negotiation Theorem
core_claim: In any negotiation with compact convex proposal space and continuous response functions, at least one self-consistent agreement must exist — a proposal that reproduces itself under all parties' best-responses. Discontinuities (ultimatums, walkouts) destroy this guarantee.

mapped_components.unit: Composite proposal vector in shared agreement space
mapped_components.selection: Fixed point where every party's best-response reproduces the original proposal
mapped_components.fitness: Pareto efficiency of the fixed-point agreement
mapped_components.boundary: Convexity (blendable issues), compactness (bounded BATNAs), continuity (no ultimatums)

falsifiable_predictions: Continuously divisible issues converge to agreement more reliably than binary choices.
Introducing ultimatums into smooth negotiations increases impasse rates.
Mediator interventions that smooth response functions increase agreement rates.
High-sensitivity (near-discontinuous) response functions predict impasse independent of Pareto surplus.
